name: button-default
visual_summary: The default button is a flat, rectangular element with a solid fill that indicates a primary action. It is commonly used where a clear call-to-action is necessary, such as in forms or on a hero section. The button is responsive and can be used on various screen sizes.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready button component with the following characteristics:

Name: button-default
Description: The default button is a flat, rectangular element with a solid fill that indicates a primary action. It is commonly used where a clear call-to-action is necessary, such as in forms or on a hero section. The button is responsive and can be used on various screen sizes.
Style: flat, solid, responsive
Interactions: clickable, accessible, tappable
Tags: button, form element, call-to-action

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
